source_event.topic: one skill per PR hardening workflow
source_event.direct_answer: Complete the active skill through green merge before starting the next skill.
source_event.question_refinements: Define branch, PR, CI, merge, cleanup, and ReleasePacket boundaries.
source_event.coverage_gaps: Need blocked CI and stale branch fields in ReleasePacket.

insights.title: One active skill through green merge
insights.pattern: Complete one skill from branch through green merge before starting another.
insights.rationale: Single-skill PRs prevent cross-skill leakage and make evidence auditable.

amendment_candidates.rationale: The same ambiguity recurred across three hardening sessions.
